hero.lede: Berth, customs, provisioning, laundry, floristry, maintenance — coordinated discreetly from a single operational desk in Tivat.

services.lede: Every request, from a late-arriving provisioning pallet to a hull wash before charter, routes through a single captain-facing coordinator.
services.berth_desc: Priority berth allocation across Porto Montenegro, Herceg Novi, and Bar. Negotiated seasonal rates and dedicated slip-holding.
services.customs_desc: End-to-end clearance for crew and guests. TIP processing, Schengen coordination, and flag-state documentation.
services.provisioning_desc: Galley-standard sourcing. Daily market runs, dry stores, wine cellar curation, and specialty imports.
services.laundry_desc: Certified marine laundry. Guest linen, crew uniforms, deck towels — tracked, returned within 24 hours.
services.floristry_desc: Arrangements from Tivat growers. Charter-day installations, refreshes, and seasonal standing orders.
services.maintenance_desc: Vetted technicians dispatched to the berth. Electrical, hydraulic, refrigeration, tender service, hull wash.

stats.title: Discretion, by design.
stats.disciplines_sub: Berth · Customs · Provisioning · Laundry · Floristry · Maintenance
stats.coordinator_sub: One named contact · no switchboard · no transfers

map.lede: Our operational footprint spans five marinas along the Montenegrin coast. Contact us directly for current berth availability and seasonal rates.
map.availabilityText: Contact us for current berth availability

process.title: A considered protocol.
process.lede: Every yacht we serve moves through four measured steps. No rushed handoffs, no lost context.
process.step1_desc: Intake call with your captain or manager.
process.step2_desc: Itinerary brief, service scope, SLAs, quote.
process.step3_desc: Dedicated coordinator on-call for the stay.

testimonials.t1_quote: We arrived with a last-minute crew change and a customs issue from our previous port. The desk had both resolved before we were tied up. I have never seen that kind of turnaround outside of Monaco.
testimonials.t2_quote: Provisioning was ready on the berth, cold chain intact, exactly as specified — including three items I expected to have substituted. The coordinator had sourced them from Podgorica overnight.
testimonials.t3_quote: Three seasons in Montenegro, three seasons with this desk. Everything is simpler when the person you're calling knows your vessel file. I don't brief them anymore — they brief me.

cta.lede: Submit your ETA, LOA, and call sign. We'll return a coordinated service brief within four operational hours.

footer.tagline: Operational logistics for superyachts transiting the Adriatic. Porto Montenegro · Herceg Novi · Bar.

processPage.lede: Four measured phases. One file, one coordinator, one escalation path. The protocol is the same for a four-day stay as for a three-month refit — only the volume differs.

phases.title: Intake.
phases.lede: You arrive. We listen. No form-gated discovery — a voice call with a coordinator who will remain on your file.
phases.detail: Most relationships begin as a captain forwarding our number. The intake is unhurried: your itinerary, your guest profile, what you are expecting from Montenegro, and where the last port fell short. We don't circulate notes — one coordinator holds your file.

phases.title: Brief.
phases.lede: A written service brief, scoped to your stay. Itemised, SLA-anchored, no retainer padding.
phases.detail: We return a brief that reads like a flight plan: berths proposed, customs approach, provisioning calendar, laundry cadence, standing maintenance, and an operational budget. Each line is signed by the discipline lead who will execute it.

phases.title: Operate.
phases.lede: Your coordinator becomes your desk. One number, one email, one person who owns every outcome.
phases.detail: From the moment the yacht enters territorial waters, the file is active. Your coordinator is physically in Tivat, moves between marinas as needed, and is on-call for the duration. Escalation ladders are defined; no request sits in an inbox.

phases.title: Report.
phases.lede: A post-call operational report, returned to the owner or manager. Lessons captured for next season.
phases.detail: Every visit is closed with a written report: what was requested, what was delivered, what exceeded or fell short. Your file compounds — by the third season, we have met more of your crew than most of their own colleagues have.

principles.b: Every request routes through your coordinator. Never a switchboard.
Government fees, berthing, technician labour — passed through at invoice.
We operate inside the rhythm of the yacht, not across it.
Every action logged, every parts ledger captured, every report filed.
Your stay lives in an encrypted record. Nothing leaves.

contactPage.lede: Five short steps. No sales call. We return a scoped service brief within four operational hours, signed by the coordinator who will hold your file.
contactPage.step0_sub: Your name and role. We keep this file confidential.
contactPage.step1_sub: Details stay within our encrypted file.
contactPage.step2_sub: Port call details. Adjustments accepted up to 48h before arrival.
contactPage.step3_sub: Select any number. Coordinator will scope each.
contactPage.successLede: Reference №{{ref}}. A coordinator will return a scoped service brief within four operational hours.

fleetPage.lede: Our operational footprint spans five marinas along the Montenegrin coast. Contact us directly for current berth availability and seasonal rates.

aboutPage.lede: Yacht Concierge is the operational arm of Montenegro Charter — the Adriatic's longest-running charter operator. Nine seasons of shore-side experience, one dedicated desk for your vessel.
aboutPage.story1: Montenegro Charter was founded in 2015 to bring honest, experienced hands to one of Europe's most underserved sailing grounds. Over nine seasons we built the relationships that make the difference: with port captains, customs offices, provisioning suppliers, and the crews who return year after year.
aboutPage.story2: Yacht Concierge grew from a straightforward observation: superyacht captains needed someone on the dock who understood the water they came from — not just the regulations of the port they'd arrived at. We created a dedicated operations desk staffed by people who have worked both sides of the gangway.
aboutPage.story3: Today we handle berth reservations, customs and immigration clearance, provisioning, crew logistics, laundry, floristry, and maintenance coordination for vessels from 30 to 120 metres — across five marinas along the Montenegrin coast.
aboutPage.quote: "We built the kind of service we wanted when we were on the water ourselves — direct, accountable, and with no surprises in the invoice."
aboutPage.teamSub: Two leads. One file. Every request answered by someone with the authority to resolve it.
aboutPage.teamBio_sanja: Founded Montenegro Charter in 2015 after a decade on the water as a charter captain. Built Yacht Concierge to solve the shore-side gaps she kept encountering — paperwork, provisioning, and the absence of anyone who stayed on a problem until it was resolved.
aboutPage.teamBio_iva: Manages real-time logistics across all active vessel files. Former charter coordinator with direct experience in Montenegrin port authority and customs workflows. When the marina office opens at 07:00, Iva is already there.
aboutPage.accountability_text: One coordinator owns your file, start to finish. No handoffs, no gaps in the chain.
aboutPage.transparency_text: Itemised invoicing, rate-card pricing. You know the cost before we move.
aboutPage.presence_text: We are physically in Tivat. When you need someone at the marina, they are already there.

notFound.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved. If you followed a link, it may be outdated.

cookie.title: We use cookies
cookie.body: We use Google Analytics to understand how visitors use this site. No personal data is sold or shared with third parties.

servicesPage.lede: Six services coordinated from a single desk in Tivat. Each carries a documented protocol, a named coordinator, and a measured SLA. Select any discipline for the full brief.
servicesPage.fleetSub: Service tier is determined by LOA. Slide to match your vessel.
servicesPage.tier1_desc: Single-coordinator coverage, daylight hours, up to 5 discipline requests per visit.
servicesPage.tier2_desc: Dedicated coordinator, 06:00–22:00 coverage, unlimited requests, provisioning concierge.
servicesPage.tier3_desc: Named operations officer, 24h coverage, advance-team deployment, customs expediting, tender crew sourcing.
servicesPage.provShopBody: 851 items sourced from Tivat, Kotor, and the Adriatic fleet. Add to cart and we deliver to your berth.

provisioningPage.lede: Galley-standard sourcing from Tivat, Kotor, and the Adriatic fleet. Tax-free procurement for yachts in transit. Same-day delivery to berth for the marked lines, 48 hours for European specialty.
provisioningPage.noResultsBody: Adjust filters or contact your coordinator for a bespoke source.
provisioningPage.cartEmptyBody: Select from the catalogue to begin.
provisioningPage.requiredFields: * YACHT, MARINA, BERTH, DATE & EMAIL REQUIRED
provisioningPage.reviewLede: Verify items, vessel details, and delivery window. Your coordinator will return a confirmation within two operational hours.
provisioningPage.orderReceivedLede: Reference №{{ref}}. Your coordinator will confirm delivery within two operational hours.

berth.coverage: Porto Montenegro · Herceg Novi · Kotor · Budva · Bar
berth.rateNote: Berth costs billed at marina list rate, no mark-up. Service fee per night, LOA-dependent.

protocol.body: Captain or manager provides ETA, LOA, beam, draft, call sign, flag state, intended stay length.
Coordinator confirms slot across our marina network based on current availability and historical berth preferences.
Slot secured, confirmation issued with berth number, hook-up particulars, and arrival coordinates.
Shore team present at berth on ETA. Lines, power, water, provisioning staging all handled.

customs.coverage: Montenegrin Ministry of Interior · Schengen adjacency
customs.rateNote: Government fees at invoice. Service fee fixed per clearance event.

protocol.body: 48 hours pre-arrival, documentation is pre-submitted to Port Authority and Customs. Any flags raised are resolved before the yacht is within territorial waters.
Licensed clearing agent boards on arrival, typically anchored off the quay. Papers reviewed, stamps issued.
TIP issued, crew list endorsed, stores manifest filed. Captain receives originals and digital copies.
Agent on-call for the duration of stay. Crew changes, stores replenishment, flag changes handled without re-intake.

provisioning.coverage: Tivat, Kotor, Budva markets · Adriatic fishing fleet · European specialty
provisioning.sla: Same-day for items sourced locally; 48h for imports
provisioning.rateNote: Produce at market rate, fully receipted. Coordination fee is a flat percentage of the invoice.

protocol.body: Chef or purser submits order via encrypted portal. Any substitution preferences noted and retained across visits.
Fresh sourced at dawn from local markets. Proteins from the Adriatic fleet. Specialty imports routed via Dubrovnik or Bari.
Cold-chain maintained from source. Provisioning staged at shore base, quality-checked by coordinator before transfer.
Berth-side handoff to galley, typically in the two-hour window before service.

laundry.coverage: On-site laundry partners in Tivat and Budva · MLC 2006 compliant
laundry.sla: Collected before 10:00 returned before 10:00 next day
laundry.rateNote: Billed per kg for linen, per item for uniforms and pressing. Volume tiers for stays over seven nights.

protocol.body: Berth-side collection with barcoded bags, logged against your vessel record.
Handled at marine-certified facility. Water hardness and detergent matched to your spec if given.
Each bag hand-inspected on return. Any replacement items sourced before delivery.
Returned folded or hanging to your preference, with a reconciliation slip against the original manifest.

floristry.coverage: Tivat growers · seasonal bloom calendar · European imports on 72h
floristry.sla: Arrangements in place by 14:00 on charter-start day
floristry.rateNote: Priced per arrangement, with tier pricing for full-vessel specifications.

protocol.body: Tone, palette, and any charter-specific notes. We retain preferences between visits.
Fresh cut from local growers on the morning of installation, or flown in for out-of-season requests.
On-board installation by our florist, using vessel-owned vases or ours. Discreet, usually within two hours.
Mid-stay refresh or full redo scheduled in advance, executed during a scheduled off-vessel window.

maintenance.coverage: Electrical, hydraulics, refrigeration, A/V, hull wash, tender service
maintenance.sla: Vetted technician at berth within 4 working hours
maintenance.rateNote: Labour at technician rate, full pass-through with ledger. Coordination fee per dispatch.

protocol.body: Engineer or captain describes the fault. Where possible, a diagnostic is run on our in-house systems before dispatch.
The right specialist, not the nearest. We maintain a vetted network of technicians across the Montenegrin coast.
Our coordinator is present for the visit. Notes are kept, parts reconciled, warranty captured.
Work report filed to the vessel log, with photographs and a parts ledger. Nothing left undocumented.
